title: Produktmanagement (Product Owner/Manager)
required_skills: Mehrjährige Erfahrung als Product Owner / Produktmanager im SaaS-Umfeld
matched_skills: Agile (Scrum, SAFe) — listed in cv skills
Cross-functional influence / Stakeholder management — HSBC PMO role
Product lifecycle management — listed in cv skills
missing_skills: Hands-on Product Owner or Product Manager title/role (Boru's background is Product Marketing, not PO/PM)
SaaS product management experience (backlog ownership, sprint planning, feature delivery)
Discovery process ownership (Opportunity Canvases, user story mapping)
Roadmap ownership with direct engineering team accountability
German language at professional/business level (JD implies German-language environment; Boru is B2)
B2B SaaS domain knowledge (telephony / cloud communications)
core_responsibilities: Product Outcomes verantworten: Mehrwert für Kunden und Unternehmen aktiv schaffen
Roadmap planen: Backlog übersetzen und klar priorisieren
Features und Produkte gemeinsam mit dem Team ausliefern (Get it done)
Kontinuierliches Lernen und Einbringen neuer Skills / Tools / Ideen
recommended_emphasis: Reframe HSBC PMO experience toward product backlog/roadmap contribution rather than pure project coordination
Highlight Agile/Scrum/SAFe usage in both HSBC and Hapag-Lloyd roles with concrete sprint examples
Emphasize cross-functional ownership and decision-making accountability to approximate PO responsibilities
Stress SaaS familiarity via tools (Jira, Confluence) and any product feedback or VOC activities
Acknowledge German B2 and show willingness to operate in German environment; do not overstate fluency
